feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Dynamic Date Selection for Background Jobs in SAP ECC 770. Support needed.
entry.content:
Hey!
Hope my message finds you well. 
I wanted to ask for support with below query. Could you please have a look into that?

Background issue description:
When I manually run T-code MB51 and select variant, the dates adjust correctly based on my dynamic date settings. However, when this report is executed as a background job, the dates remain static and do not update dynamically. In result, report is send with improper dates as system is not dynamically adjusting dates. 

My needs:
I want to understand and fix problem with static date in automatic background job (I want date area to be changed every time the job is running). 

Can you support me with that please? I am not sure, where I am doing mistake. 

Detailed information: (please feel free to ask about other information - I am trying not to get into deep details). 

1. I have setup variant in MB51 with Dynamic Date selection on field  (2 last days). 
Screenshot below:

2. I had setup Run in background job (with use of Program ->Execute in background)

Date/Time -> Period Values -> Daily -> Save

3. Review and adjust job in background with use of SM37

I had setup details related to sending background job results into specified mailbox according to below instruction:

http://scn.sap.com/docs/DOC-44263

Background job is sending results into precise email address, however it's sending all the time the same area of date (dynamic date selection is not working here). 

I am guessing the issue is not there, therefor I am not providing more details and screenshots here (let me know if I am wrong ;)).


Additional information about authorizations:
Important information: I do not have access to SA38, SE38, SM36. Just MB51 and SM37.


Can you please help me to setup Dynamic date selection for Background job?

entry.title: material requirement based on products declared ?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I wonder how to tackle following issue: 

Every now and then process orders of i.e. 1234567 material production will generate waste that is packed into empty bag (i.e 7654321) 

At the minute each process order for this material (1234567) expects 1 or 2 empty bags (7654321) just in case if it generate waste so I have a lot of POs that expected consumption of empty bags is 1 or 2 but actual consumption none because not all of the process orders will generate waste or rather - not all of them declare it waiting till it reaches certain level worth packing away and disposing. From compliance point of view it looks like we're not issuing expected material into each PO. 

Is it possible to set BOM up so Process Order expects empty bag material to be consumed only when waste material has been declared during production ? Also is it possible to be even more specific i.e. If declared 450kg = 1bag is expected, if above = 2bags etc ? 

Or perhaps there's other way to improve this ? 

Thanks,

JJ

entry.title: IW38 ,Display number of entries (Counter) in PM list edit reports not showing to add in layout.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

User requested to see the number of entries for IW38 PM list edit report but for this the Counter is not showing in the layout to choose.

We required the functionality described in KBA  2181264 

Best Regards,

Ganesh

entry.title: Production order - plant/storage locs for a component
entry.content:
Hello expers,

Could the below additional screen "Component Plant/Storage locs Restrictions" be set to display all storage types of stock - not just unrestricted stock but also special stock, restricted stock and in quality inspection stock?

In this example the item is with Special stock indicator but the stock screen doesn't show it as available although in mb52 it is. 

 

Thanks in advance for your feedback!

entry.title: Bounced NSF Check
entry.content: A bunch of incoming payments posted through FBZ1. One of the payments was a bounced check. Is there a possibility to reverse / remove that line item within the document number? I do not want to reverse the whole document as all other payments are valid.

entry.title: Exchange among SAP Experts: What do you wish you had known earlier?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

As someone relatively new to the SAP ecosystem, I’m curious to hear what insights or advice would have been helpful for you at the start of your SAP journey. I believe this would be a great opportunity for us to connect, share our experiences, and learn from each other. What key information or best practices do you wish you had known earlier?

Let’s start a conversation and grow together.

Kind regards

Jerry

entry.title: Get individual primary key values from CDHDR table
entry.content:
Dear all

In CDHDR table, there is a TABKEY column. That column stores the primary key columns concatenated value.

For example, for BSEG, it is something like this -

508123477777777702024666

I realised the pattern falls under this category -

MANDT(3 digits)||BUKRS(4 digits)||BELNR(10 digits)||GJAHR(4 digits)||BUZEI(3 digits)

Now, I like to get the individual column values from the concatenated value. I read in few blogs that there could be a mapping table that helps us to have this logic at scale for several other tables as well like MARA.

Appreciate if you can share with me the SQL query that could translate this mapping at scale for 1000s of SAP tables.

Please note I have replicated from SAP ERP CDPOS & CDHDR tables into Databricks. So, I have to get this logic (SQL query to get primary key columns names in a particular order, then get the individual values from the concatenated TABKEY value based on their positions & length) implemented within Databricks only...

Appreciate any support in this matter 

Br,

Noor.

entry.title: Any set of rules how to fill SD Table TVWA GoodsReceivingHours?
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I just checked the goods receiving hours in our customer data and found that there is a huge variation in how my colleagues filled the fields.

1st question:
Are there any rules defined by SAP on how to fill these fields? I couldn´t find anything within the helping sections.

2nd question:
I have an excel export for the fieds. Is there a possibility to change the times in the excel sheet and to import it back to SAP?

Thanks in advanced!😍
Christian

Here is an example how the monday is used in our customer data: 
H: WAMOAB1
I: WAMOBI1
J: WAMOAB2
K: WAMOBI2

entry.title: SQ02 Infoset join to additional field
entry.content:
Hi,

My objective is to link sales orders to process orders (VBAK and AFPO) in a report. The issue is that our configuration is MTS with final assembly and not MTO, so we are creating process orders (COR1) and not production orders so we can't create and order against a specific sales order.

I first tried to use a non-used field in sales order to provide the process order number like VBAK-IHREZ and then link AFPO-AUFNR to VBAK-IHREZ. It did not work of course.

Then I tried to create an Extra > Additional field ZAUFNR like AFPO-AUFNR and code VBAK-IHREZ Move TO ZAUFNR and link AFPO to ZAUFNR. The output is all blank field except AUFNR where the correct process order is populated. 

Is there a way to achieve that with a custom field? Or any other workarounds? 

Thanks for your support!

Carl

entry.title: Scheduling agreement not fetching price from info record
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I have a query about the pricing of Scheduling agreement and info record.
First I created info record for following period -
01.01.2024 to 31.12.2024 => 10$
01.01.2025 to 31.12.2025 => 11$
01.01.2026 to 31.12.2026 => 12$

Later, when I created a scheduling agreement with validity period 01.01.2024 to 31.12.2026, the system is showing only pricing record with 10$.

I see the reference of the Info record at item level of scheduling agreement but system doesn't consider the validity period of SA and info record.

Is there any way, the Scheduling agreement can fetch all the three year's valid pricing records from info record such that I will not have to maintain the price manually for all the 3 years in SA.

I referred sap note 1973823 but it wasn't of help.

Thanks

entry.title: How to find the volumes for a subassembly produced in the last 12 & 6 months
entry.content: How to find the volumes for a subassembly produced in the last 12 & 6 months

entry.title: QA32 Inspection plan not found
entry.content:
Hello experts,

i have setup a quality inspection for raw material, and i made GR for that material now the material in quality inspection stock, and the status of inspection lot is CRTD CHCR SPRQ.

so i am not able to do Usage decision.

How to get the inspection lot in REL state? (also inspection plan is already created for that material)

 

thank you

entry.title: Error while generating E-Invoice
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

The customer has issued a Tax Invoice with the Bill To/Ship To Address ID as "S D CORPORATION," but in the BP Master, the Address ID is recorded as "SD CORPORATION."

Upon reviewing the BP Master change log, we did not find any irrelevant entries related to the Address ID. Could you please advise what might be the reason for this discrepancy, and how we can check if the user updated the details from the backend?

According to the BP Master log, the Address ID was updated from "S D CORPORATION" to "SD CORPORATION" at 18:34:33 on 20/09/24, while the invoice was created earlier, at 15:09:13 on the same day.

Your guidance on this matter would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Unable to Fetch the Redayness Report with RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA
entry.content:
Hello,

As per the given note- 2913617, we have implemented the required snotes which can be implementable in our system.

However we are still not getting the report as there is some error coming on.

entry.title: Preceding Whitespace is trimmed when an IDoc is sent from SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
hi all,

We are sending an IDOC from SAP Integration suite to SAP ECC systems, but noticed preceding whitespace is being trimmed in a field when it reaches SAP ECC. The logic in mapping is such that if we have more than 70 characters in file name , then a new segment gets created with remaining characters of filename. And when the 71st character is a whitespace this is being trimmed at SAP ECC.

When we switch on trace or simulate it in Integration Suite the space is visible , but is missing when we check the same in SAP ECC systems.

We tried the same example via SAP PO and noticed the space appearing in SAP ECC.

Filename Example - Batch HF_ID225test_2024xxxxxxxxxx_xxxxx_x_xxx 2024 036_xxx_an_xxxxxxxx Seeds_20240912.pdf

Could someone suggest if this is standard behavior of SAP Integration Suite or if there is any standard solution to achieve expected outcome in SPA ECC  

SAP IS simulation

SAP ECC

Regards,

Smitha

entry.title: Absence Quota Generation after 7 hours of overtime on time evaluation
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We have a requirement for automatic generation of Absence Quota Type 02 when the employee has worked overtime for 7 hours. I have checked the IMG for Generation Rules for Quota Type Selection and have some question about this configuration

1. How do i set the minimum hours worked before the quota is generated? i tried to look around but didn't find any field that indicate the minimum time balance needed.

2. How do i set the validity from of the quota as the generation date and the validity end as +3 after the generation date? i'm guessing the option would be transfer time but i want to make sure what's the differences between accrual period and transfer time

The use-case would be like this :

- On 24.09.2024 if the employee have a minimum of 7 hours overtime, the time evaluation will generate 1 Day of absence quota with validity date 24.09.2024-24.12.2024

Thanks and regard, Kelvin

entry.title: Get all tables mapped to an OBJECTCLASS in CDHDR
entry.content:
Dear all

I like to know a way to get all SAP ERP tables that get updated when an entry for a particular OBJECTCLASS is logged in CDHDR table. I see that there is an entry logged in CDHDR with OBJECTCLASS called "BELEG". I understood that this could mean several tables like BSEG, BKPF, BSID, BSAD have got documents updated within them.

I noticed that updates (Us) in SAP ERP are not getting logged in CDPOS table. So, I like to rely on CDHDR and get list of all tables that got updated for a particular UDATE & OBJECTCLASS. Using this, I will check if data is fresh in my target system (Databricks).

appreciate ideas/thoughts.

Br,

Noor.

entry.content:
How to send the Port details in the E-Waybill XML for export scenario?

entry.title: Event message sending not permitted: Event type evaluation skipped
entry.content: I'm facing with a strange message, Can anyone guide me pls?

entry.title: STO with multiple Schedule Lines will not modify them if new stock becomes available
entry.content:
I have an Intercompany STO with a qty of 1000 due on Oct 10.  I only have 900 in stock and a future PO for another 500 due on Oct 30.  The STO creates a single schedule line for 1000 and confirms 900.  When V_V2 is performed, a second schedule line appears for the uncommitted 100, with a date in November.  This occurs because the availably check is set to use future POs.  Again, this activity is all expected. 

Then we call our vendor and get the next delivery expedited to an earlier date.  The PO delivers early on Oct 01.  we now have 1400 units in stock, but V_V2 will not change the scheduled lines to meet the original requested due date.  It seems to look at the two schedule lines and confirms it can meet them.  My only choice is to open the STO and manually change the schedule lines.   This is fine for 1 STO but this manual intervention is not effective for the entire plant. 

Is there any way to get SAP (ECC6) to change the schedule lines to meet the original due date of Oct 10, now that we have Stock again? 

 

The STO requested 1000 on Oct 10.  The current Schedule lines will deliver 900 on Oct 10 and 100 in November.  This is not desirabl.
